testApply.title: Test User Signup (Free)
testApply.description: After consultation and selection, you can join as a beta tester. Use it in real store flows and help us improve Floxync with feedback.
testApply.userLine1: Use the app in daily workflow
testApply.opsBody: Please apply only if you can try real workflows and provide product feedback.
testApply.successSub: We will contact you on business days.
testApply.name: Name
testApply.policy: Submitted data is used only for test-user consultation and invite processing.
testApply.reasonPlaceholder: Tell us what you want to validate and what feedback you can provide.
